title: FLI product vision — API-first, self-hostable annotation layer (cycle 01)
rationale: Evidence: research-cycle-01.md Q1-Q3. Felt has no public REST API (Q2) → unique positioning. RN is the first committed consumer (persona 1 switch trigger). Storyteller persona validates the Felt-aligned UI work already done (12/14 promises shipped). Integrator persona validates the /api/v1/ versioning + SDK work queued next.

title: Measurement data persists on annotations (cycle 01, seed 34c1)
rationale: Spatial Researcher persona (RN interop) treats measurements as queryable/exportable data. Our only committed consumer (RN) is a Researcher. Felt-alignment argument doesn't apply to our REST API contract — Felt has no public API. Keeping measurement as UI-only would force RN to reconstruct the computation client-side each render, which contradicts the API-first vision.
